examples.title: Binary Semaphore Implementation
examples.description: Implementation of wait and signal operations for binary semaphore
examples.explanation: Binary semaphore initialized to 1 ensures mutual exclusion. Only one process can enter critical section at a time. Other processes block when they find mutex=0.

examples.title: Producer-Consumer Solution
examples.description: Semaphore-based solution for bounded buffer producer-consumer problem
examples.explanation: Two counting semaphores (empty, full) track buffer slots. Binary mutex ensures only one process accesses buffer at a time. This prevents overflow and underflow.

examples.title: Readers-Writers Solution (Reader Preference)
examples.description: Semaphore solution allowing multiple readers but exclusive writers
examples.explanation: readcount tracks number of active readers. First reader locks writer out (wait on wrt), last reader releases lock. Writers must wait until all readers finish.
